ITEM 12. SECURITY OWNERSHIP OF CERTAIN BENEFICIAL OWNERS AND MANAGEMENT AND RELATED STOCKHOLDER MATTERS
The information required by Item 201(d) of Regulation S-K is included under “Compensation Discussion and Analysis - Executive Compensation Tables - Equity Compensation Plan Information” in the definitive Proxy Statement for our [DATE_TIME] Annual Meeting of Shareholders and is incorporated herein by reference. The information required by Item 403 of Regulation S-K is included under “Stock Ownership Information - Stock Holdings of Certain Owners and Management” in the definitive Proxy Statement for our [DATE_TIME] Annual Meeting of Shareholders and is incorporated herein by reference.
ITEM 13.
